_docs: Single source of truth for every bot. The orchestrator (/api/orchestrator) reads this, resolves dependsOn order, and runs each enabled bot with its timeout. kind: 'http' calls an existing /api endpoint; 'grok' is a config-only Grok bot run by bots/lib/grokbot.js (prompt file + inputs + output blob, no code needed); 'internal' maps to a module in bots/lib. enabled can be overridden at runtime from ops.html (stored in the tower-bot-overrides blob, since serverless functions cannot edit this file). alert.onFail / alert.qualityDrop feed the alerts bot.

bots.name: Daily Briefing
bots.purpose: Surface the 5 most important Texas Longhorns news items of the last 48h for the homepage briefing panel

bots.name: Newsroom Story Generator
bots.purpose: Write one deep-dive draft story per run for the newsroom CMS (saved as draft, never auto-published)

bots.name: Stories Feed Refresh
bots.purpose: Generate 3 grounded stories per run, dedupe against the archive, publish to the public stories feed

bots.name: Recruiting Fact-Checker
bots.purpose: Verify the live 2027 class ranks / commit count via web search; feeds the labeled 'Live via Grok' block on recruiting.html

bots.name: Odds Cache Warm
bots.purpose: Warm the odds edge cache for the 2026 schedule (The Odds API or consensus fallback)

bots.name: Recruiting Intelligence Board
bots.purpose: Monitor public recruiting sources (247Sports, On3, Rivals) for Texas football; update offer/visit/crystal ball/commitment/ranking data for each tracked recruit; publish live board to the recruiting database

bots.name: Social Drafter
bots.purpose: Turn the day's top story into 3 X post drafts for human review on ops.html — never auto-posted

bots.name: X Auto-Poster
bots.purpose: Post the top story (breaking draft from social-drafter) and top briefing item to @towerreportai on X automatically after each pipeline run. Deduplicates within 8h.
bots.schedule: orchestrator am+pm, after social-drafter and briefing

bots.name: Ops Alerts
bots.purpose: Runs last every cycle; posts to Slack (SLACK_OPS_WEBHOOK) on bot failure, quality drop >15, missed runs, or review queue >10
bots.schedule: orchestrator am+pm, always last; also the 10:05 UTC watchdog (GitHub Actions cron)
